params.description: Line extends from Museum bar end down to axis, showing it lands at 30.

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Find where the Museum bar ends, then look straight down to the scale at the bottom.

incorrects.description: Student selected 25: estimated between gridlines but didn't identify that bar ends exactly at 30

params.description: Museum bar and the 30 gridline both highlighted.

steps.text: Here's a hint: the bar ends right at a gridline. Check which line it touches.

incorrects.description: Student selected 35: read one gridline too far to the right

params.description: 30 gridline pulses to show where Museum bar actually ends.

steps.text: You're working on it. The Museum bar is shorter than that. Find exactly where it stops on the scale.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Line extends from Museum bar end to axis, landing exactly at 30. Value 30 highlights.

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. The Museum bar extends to the right and stops at 30 on the scale. That line shows us 30 votes. The answer is 30.
